value.string: Author, Description and Change History Section
This bot does all CRUD operation in excel sheet by oledb connection
Comment on GO-LIVE, Supply input parameter values for unit testing.
Delete empty records, commented and can be used in future

variables.description: A variable you can use for assignments
variables.name: prompt-assignment

variables.description: Columns are separated  by â(column separator) and in order as in excel sheet .It will be used for BULK_INSERT operation
variables.name: IN_Columns

variables.description: Input data which will be used in BULK_INSERT operation.
variables.name: IN_DtData

variables.description: Excel file full path (with file name) on which operation will be made.
variables.name: IN_FileFullPath

variables.description: Base OLE connection string.i.e Provider=Microsoft.ACE.OLEDB.12.0;Data Source='[FILE_FULL_PATH]';Extended Properties='Excel 12.0 Xml;HDR=YES'
variables.name: IN_OLEConnection

defaultValue.string:
select a.JobRequestNo from [OpenPosition$] a
 inner join [SearchFilter$] b on a.JobRequestNo = b.JobRequestNo

variables.description: Give complete query for operation types GET,UPDATE,INSERT
variables.name: IN_QueryString
